label: Transaction_Risk_Control_System
info:
A real-time fraud detection system built using Node-RED, Fuzzy Logic, Dashboard UI, and DB2. 
It simulates transactions, calculates a risk score (Normal/Warning/Critical), and provides alerts, 
visualization, and audit logging.

#  How to Run

Import the flow into Node-RED
Install required nodes: Dashboard, UI Table, DB2
Configure DB2 connection (DB2 for i Config)
Deploy and open: http://iug3.rowton.it:18815/ui/
Use:

Transaction Stream → generate transactions
Force High Risk → simulate fraud


#  Key Features
Fuzzy logic-based risk scoring engine
Live dashboard (gauge, chart, stats)
Critical alerts with adjustable threshold
DB2 audit logging of flagged transactions
Analyst review workflow (disposition + notes)

#  Flow Summary
Generate → Analyse (Fuzzy Engine) → Display → Alert → Store (DB2) → Review

name: Generate Transaction
Fuzzy Risk & Explainability Engine
First flow: Generating Transaction in certain interval and forcing high risk
Extract Score
func:
msg.payload = msg.payload.riskScore;
return msg;

name: Stats Aggregator
Stats Display
format:
{{msg.payload.totalProcessed}}
Processed
{{msg.payload.flaggedCount}}
Flagged
{{msg.payload.avgRiskScore}}
Avg Score

name: Initialise Stats
Update Flagged Table
Prepare DB2 Insert
Creating Audit Table
info: Temporary mini-flow to creating a custom table for auditing purpose.

name: Build Create Table SQL
func:
msg.payload = 
`CREATE TABLE IUGRED_15.RISK_AUDIT_LOG (
  TRANSACTION_ID VARCHAR(30),
  ACCOUNT_ID     VARCHAR(20),
  AMOUNT         DECIMAL(10,2),
  RISK_SCORE     INT,
  RISK_LABEL     VARCHAR(10),
  REASON         VARCHAR(200),
  CREATED_AT     TIMESTAMP
)`;

return msg;

name: Verifying if row is inserted in Table
Select Audit Rows
func:
msg.payload = `
SELECT TRANSACTION_ID, ACCOUNT_ID, AMOUNT, RISK_SCORE, RISK_LABEL, REASON, CREATED_AT
FROM IUGRED_15.RISK_AUDIT_LOG
ORDER BY CREATED_AT DESC
FETCH FIRST 10 ROWS ONLY
`;
return msg;

name: Automated Critical Alert and popup for critical threshold
info:
Here we are going to pass:-

2. build alert message text
3. show popup on dashboard

name: Build Alert Message
Update Threshold
Alter Table for Analyst Disposition Workflow

options.label: Disposition (Confirmed Fraud / False Positive / Needs Escalation)

name: Process Disposition
Build Disposition Confirmation
Prepare DB2 Disposition Update

func:
msg.payload = `
SELECT TRANSACTION_ID, RISK_LABEL, DISPOSITION, ANALYST_NOTES, REVIEWED_AT
FROM IUGRED_15.RISK_AUDIT_LOG
ORDER BY CREATED_AT DESC
FETCH FIRST 10 ROWS ONLY
`;
return msg;

name: Update Critical Alerts Feed
Critical Alerts Feed
Build Create Review Table SQL
Prepare Review Log Insert
Select Review Rows
func:
msg.payload = `
SELECT REVIEW_ID, TRANSACTION_ID, ACCOUNT_ID, DISPOSITION, ANALYST_NOTES, REVIEWED_AT
FROM IUGRED_15.ANALYST_REVIEW_LOG
ORDER BY REVIEWED_AT DESC
FETCH FIRST 10 ROWS ONLY
`;
return msg;

name: Separate Analyst Review Log (append-only audit trail)
info: Each disposition submission now also writes a row to its own ANALYST_REVIEW_LOG table, so history is preserved even if the same transaction is reviewed more than once, in addition to updating RISK_AUDIT_LOG for quick lookup.

name: Update Review Log Display
Review Log Table
format: Time Txn ID Disposition Notes
